LanguageData.FB_BulbfreakFusionInvalidCaster: Only a living flesh-colony pawn can begin flesh fusion.
LanguageData.FB_BulbfreakFusionAlreadyActive: This pawn is already involved in flesh fusion.
LanguageData.FB_BulbfreakFusionNoDonors: Not enough suitable allied fingerspikes, trispikes, or toughspikes nearby.
LanguageData.FB_BulbfreakFusionNoGatherCells: No reachable space around the caster for the fleshbeasts to gather.
LanguageData.FB_BulbfreakFusionStarted: {PAWN_labelShort} calls {0} fleshbeasts into convergence. Combined mass value: {1}.
LanguageData.FB_BulbfreakCollapseDesc: Collapse this fused fleshbeast, releasing the sealed host and letting the body split apart as if killed. Most of the fleshbeasts spent on the convergence will be lost.
LanguageData.FB_BulbfreakCollapseNoHost: There is no sealed host inside.
